---
title: "Cleaning data for occurrence and community databases" "Database #1" 
subtitle: 'EpIG volunteership'
format: html
editor: visual
date: today
author: "Kelly Zuluaga" 
editor_options: 
  chunk_output_type: console
---

#Libraries

```{r}
library(dplyr)
library(tidyverse)
library(stringr)
library(readr)
library(sf)
#library(rWCVP)
library(CoordinateCleaner)
library(ggplot2) 

spp_link <- read.csv("data/Text/1_Raw/text__CR2024.csv")

head(spp_link)
View(spp_link)
str(spp_link)
glimpse(spp_link)


str(spp_link)
dplyr::glimpse(spp_link)
```

\

```{r}

#Dataset Structure

str(spp_link$taxonRank) #[1:71897] "SPECIES"
str(spp_link$lifeForm) #[1:71897] "E"
str(spp_link$institutionCode) #[1:71897] "CR" (It doesn't correct. The column name should be countryCode)
str(spp_link$eventDate) #[1:71897] All dates are completed
str(spp_link$ocurrenceID)
str(spp_link$basisOfRecord) #"PreservedSpecimen"
str(spp_link$typeStatus) # [1:71897] NA
str(spp_link$associatedReferences) #[1:71897]  NA
str(spp_link$collectionCode) #[1:71897] NA
str(spp_link$recordedBy) #[1:71897] Authors
str(spp_link$identifiedBy) #[1:71897] Authors
str(spp_link$datasetID) #[1:71897] CR2024
str(spp_link$matchCodeEpig) #[1:71897] Numbers - not DarwinCore
str(spp_link$matchedNameEpig) #[1:71897] Species
str(spp_link$typeStatus) #[1:71897] NA
```


```{r}
#unique values in columns

sort(unique(spp_link$occurrenceID)) #ok

sort(unique(spp_link$basisOfRecord)) #ok

sort(unique(spp_link$typeStatus)) #ok

sort(unique(spp_link$associatedReferences)) #ok

sort(unique(spp_link$institutionCode)) #change by countryCode

sort(unique(spp_link$taxonRank))#ok

sort(unique(spp_link$collectionCode)) #ok

sort(unique(spp_link$recordedBy)) #needs curation

sort(unique(spp_link$recordNumber)) #review this "11.001 B"

sort(unique(spp_link$identifiedBy)) #needs curation

sort(unique(spp_link$lifeForm)) #needs curation

sort(unique(spp_link$datasetID)) #ok

sort(unique(spp_link$matchCodeEpig)) #ok 

sort(unique(spp_link$matchedNameEpig)) #0, 1, 2 or 3

sort(unique(spp_link$decimalLatitude)) #ok

sort(unique(spp_link$decimalLongitude)) #ok

sort(unique(spp_link$eventDate)) #all dates are ok. Year column doesn't need

sort(unique(spp_link$changes)) #ok


```
